text: Love is our shared truth. Peace is our eternal hope. We have to pray for this war so that the war can end quickly and that everyone can live in harmony. We must not look for peace from conflicts. We should look for peace from sharing. We should respect the value of existence, embrace everyone's space, and share everyone's achievements. This is the way we feel about each other. We, the religious people, work together to pray for this war so that this pain does not happen and we can return to normal quickly. Only when we find peace can we turn back. How do we start from the ecosystem? If the ecosystem has power, this will be solved. It is impossible without power. If the ecosystem has power, everyone knows. We have to live. We have to protect the Earth. If we want the Earth, we have to protect everyone. In this day and age, when values are mixed, a lot of people are worried or anxious. I would like to introduce our former prophet, President Nelson Nelson. He used Jesus Christ as an example to encourage us. He said, I wish you all to use good words to persuade each other to fight and provoke. Use understanding to replace hostility. Use peace to replace conflict. The survivor is Jesus Christ. He is the head of this church. We are his servants. He will help us to become his messengers of peace. I witness this in the name of Jesus Christ. Amen. Peace be upon you. May the Lord's peace be upon you. In accordance with the will of Jesus Christ, in accordance with the rules he made for us, we will naturally attain peace. Jesus Christ created so many different ethnicities, different cultures, different ethnic groups. He did not decide who is superior and who is inferior. He decided to follow the rules of this world in accordance with the rules of this world. In the end, he was regarded as a superior person. Of course, in this world, no one can judge that a person is superior to another. Therefore, there must be a consensus between human beings so that we can coexist, live in harmony, and eventually attain peace. As religion, especially the Orthodox Church, says that God is love, not has emotion, exists as coexistence, the Father, the Son, and the Holy Spirit. And as God exists, it's the coexistence that makes existence, calls us to coexist, to exist because you exist, not because of me. And you are my life, and you are my salvation. The religious leaders, if we want to be honest, cannot exercise political power, cannot have political positions, because peace is not only we don't fight. Peace, by that way, is in a prison. Peace means human rights, freedom, at least some freedom and respect in the human being, in the human rights. We must be very honest, because if we exercise the human rights, it's a very important thing. Shalom, shalom means in Hebrew, hello, it also means greeting, and it also means peace, and the way which peace could be attained is if people would understand and realize that God is watching over us, and he cares about us, and we're all his children, no matter what is our religion, and no matter what is our background, what country we live in, what language we speak, everyone are God's children, and he created us and put us in this world in order to make the world a better place, to be rectified, to elevate the world. And in that spirit, we all, all human beings, are equal to that part. Everyone understands that we, as long as we understand that we are creatures created by God for the purpose of making the world a better place, we can get along with each other. There's no room and no place and no idea for people to start getting involved in matters of bloodshed and in wars and so on. I would like to extend our wishes and our hope and prayer that the world will be what it's supposed to be, that the purpose in which it was created will be fulfilled. When we live in the human world, we need to pay special attention to the harmony between all beings and all things. And this kind of harmony is the eternal truth of the universe. When we have love in our hearts, when we think about other things around us, it also needs to have a little love and care that we give to it and when we give it special attention, it also needs to have a special relationship that is harmonious with each other. We need to love each other with our own hearts. If there is a war, it will definitely create a social chaos. What's important is that the conflict between a country and a country and the family will be destroyed. Everyone will be separated from their loved ones and even those who are alive will die. So it will be a tragedy. Last week, we held a meeting for the peace of religion to pray for world peace. We are also willing to connect different religions and to persuade different religions to move towards peace and to move forward. When the society is in chaos, the first religion came out, the 24th religion, and it called for different religions to pray for peace in Misha. In Misha, there is a belief that we should pray for peace, for the peace of the Middle East. Everyone needs to have this motivation. Only peace can make us happy. If there is no peace, there will be no happiness. We call for different religions to pursue peace, to seek peace, to seek peace. This is a common feature. We should all work together in this direction to seek peace. We should all pray for peace and seek peace. You
